headline: Unlocking Q1 Potential of Abbott (ABT): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Abbott (ABT), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.

raw.headline: Unlocking Q1 Potential of Abbott (ABT): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics

headline: Abbott Laboratories to contest damages awarded in NEC infant-formula ruling
summary: An Illinois court awarded $53m to four families last week and a further $17m on Friday (10 April) in the latest necrotizing enterocolitis (NEC) legal case.

headline: Illinois Jury Awards Four Families $70 Million in Verdict Against Baby Formula Manufacturer
summary: CHICAGO - A Cook County jury has returned a verdict of $70 million including $17 million in punitive damages against Abbott Laboratories, the manufacturer of the cow's milk-based infant feeding...
